title: Tunisian Pears Tagine
description: A comforting and buttery Tunisian dish featuring pears, this tagine is perfect for a cold day, and is naturally sugar free friendly.
instructions: Melt the butter in a large clay or ceramic tagine or Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the sliced almonds and cook, stirring frequently, until they are lightly toasted.
Add the ground cinnamon and ground ginger and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the pear halves and cook, stirring occasionally, until they are tender and lightly caramelized.
Add the lemon juice, water, and salt, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, until the pears are very tender.
Remove the tagine from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Serve the pears warm, topped with the toasted almonds and the sauce from the tagine.
